channel.title: FPV Flight-Control Lab Updates
channel.description: Updates for FPV flight-control hardware, INAV firmware experiments, and Blackbox tuning tools.

item.title: Good-first-issue and review paths opened
item.description: New documentation and validation issues were added for SkyPilot H743, the 75A ESC, INAV PID Tuner, and INAV D-term LPF flight testing.

item.title: Review snapshots and project pages published
item.description: Review snapshot releases and dedicated project pages were published for the core FPV and INAV projects.

item.title: INAV D-term LPF PR checks are green
item.description: The active upstream INAV PR is clean and mergeable, with the feature disabled by default and docs checks passing.
